title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 27.105 - Attorney general's duty to enforce provisions of Chapter 572
text:
27.105.  Attorney general's duty to enforce provisions of Chapter 572. — The attorney general shall have a concurrent duty to enforce the provisions of chapter 572.
(L. 1977 S.B. 60, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 572.110; Effective 1-01-17
